title: ClackAgentRecord
description: A single agent's registration record in the Clack gateway registry.

agentId.description: Unique agent identifier across the pack. Lowercase, no spaces. e.g. 'sable', 'vesper'.

hostId.description: Host the agent runs on. e.g. 'omni', 'desk', 'teseract'. Must match the Tailscale hostname.

tailscaleUrl.description: A2A endpoint over Tailscale (100.x.x.x). Used for all internal traffic.

publicUrl.description: A2A endpoint via CF tunnel. Null if agent is not externally reachable.

wakeUrl.description: Harness wake endpoint. Called by the gateway after routing a message. Format depends on harnessType.

harnessType.description: Harness the agent runs under. Determines which wake adapter the gateway uses.

transport.description: Message delivery mechanism for this agent.

capabilities.description: Skill/topic tags this agent handles. Used for capability-based routing. e.g. ['devops', 'git', 'deploy'].

registeredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last registration or re-registration.

expiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp after which this record is considered stale. Refreshed on heartbeat.

ttl.description: Heartbeat TTL in seconds. Agent must POST /heartbeat within this window. Default: 120.

bootstrapTokenHash.description: Bcrypt hash of the per-agent bootstrap token. Plain-text token lives in Infisical only. Null for local mDNS-trusted agents.
